svg.title: Arpanjeet Singh README theme switcher
svg.desc: Animated GitHub README banner that switches between a live dark theme and a Windows 95 theme while keeping the same section structure.

g.text: Education : B.S. Computer Science @ San Jose State University
Goal : Keep learning faster than AI evolves
Motto → "Everything goes stale. So do I. So I rebuild."
